privacyNoBsn: No citizen service number is processed
havenDigitalDisclosure: Hello, I am HAVEN — your digital helper.
scamCalmPause: Let us slow down together. You do not need to do anything right now.
locationPrivacy: HAVEN shows an approximate area, never a live route.
buurtPrivacy: Your name is shared only if both people say yes.
allTakenSubtitle: Well done. You are done for today.
buurtNotActive: The neighbourhood connector is not yet active. You decide when to join.
onboardingAllSetSubtitle: Thank you. You can start using HAVEN now.
onboardingFooter: You can always change this later in Settings.
marVerifySubtitle: Have you just taken this medication?
fallSubtitle: We detected a possible fall. Are you alright?
helpOverlayEmergencyHint: 🆘 The red emergency button (bottom-right) is for real emergencies.
helpOverlayTriggerHint: Opens an information overlay with explanation and triggers a tactile vibration
helpOverlayCloseHint: Closes the information overlay and triggers a tactile vibration
floatingVoiceSwitchHintListening: Tap again to complete and send voice recording.
floatingVoiceSwitchHintIdle: Tap once to speak for 60 seconds. Voice is converted to text automatically.
carerOrgSelect: Select your Agency and Nursing Team
carerHandoverOffline: Saved offline. Will synchronize as soon as you connect to Wi-Fi.
errorNetworkSlow: The connection to the healthcare server is slow or unavailable. No worries, your observations are saved safely offline.
errorRateLimit: We are receiving many requests right now. No rush, we will automatically try again shortly.
errorForbidden: You currently do not have access permissions for this action. Please ask your family delegate or visiting nurse to adjust this for you.
errorConflict: This action has already been successfully recorded. You do not need to do anything else.
errorBsnProhibited: To protect your medical privacy, we cannot publicly process texts containing a Citizen Service Number (BSN).
errorAuthFailed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials.
errorGeneral: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
handover.save_note.label: Save note
handover.save_note.hint: Saves your clinical observation locally or online
handover.photo.demo: Photo added (demo). Camera will open in production.
handover.alert.network_err: Saved offline due to network error.
summary.generate.label: Generate Shift Summary
summary.generate.hint: Compiles a summary of your visiting nurse shift for delegate sharing
summary.title: Shift Summary
summary.alert.shared: Handover shared with next shift successfully.
summary.share.label: Share handover
summary.patients.label: Patients
actions.lang_toggle.alert: Language switching is managed in Settings → Language. A true language switch requires an app restart.
actions.contrast_toggle.alert: High contrast is toggled in Settings.
actions.font_bigger.alert: Font size can be adjusted in Settings.
actions.tell_pills.alert: You have 3 medications today: Metformin 500 mg at 08:00 and 18:00, Lisinopril 10 mg at 08:00, Vitamin D 20 mcg at 18:00.
actions.review_alerts.alert: Open Family Dashboard for a calm alerts review.
actions.send_ok.alert: Thumbs up sent to your family.
actions.buurt_privacy.alert: Neighbourhood connections are anonymous until mutual confirmation.
actions.opt_in_buurt.alert: Activating the neighbourhood connector is managed in the Family Dashboard.
actions.crisis.alert: Crisis mode activated. Family is alerted.
actions.toggle_night.alert: Night mode is toggled in Settings.
actions.wellness_good.alert: Glad to hear you are feeling well.
actions.cognitive.alert: What day of the week is it today?
actions.mode_switch.alert: Switching modes is managed in the Family Dashboard.
actions.consent_decline.alert: Declined. You can change this later in Settings.
actions.consent_defer.alert: Deciding later is ok. We will remind you tomorrow.
actions.signin_required.alert: Signing in is required to answer video calls.
actions.daily_rhythm.start: Starting your daily rhythm. Good morning!
actions.memory_recap.alert: Retrieving your recent memories. One moment…
actions.fall_ok.alert: Glad you are ok. Family has been informed that everything is fine.
actions.fall_help.alert: Help is on the way! Family and emergency services are alerted.
actions.take_offline.alert: Taken! Will synchronize as soon as you connect to Wi-Fi.
actions.live_signin_required.alert: Signing in is required for live backend actions.
actions.is_this_real.alert: HAVEN is reviewing this contact. You do not need to respond yet.
actions.resolve_scam.alert: Marked as resolved. Your shield is updated.
auth.biometric.android.subtitle: Confirm your identity to continue

seed.msg1.body: Thinking of you this morning. I will call after work.
seed.msg2.body: Video greeting from grandchild saved for today.
seed.msg3.body: Voice message about the weekly overview.
seed.msg4.body: Warm regards to Sarah and Lucas.
seed.scam1.explanation: Someone called asking for your bank card. Never share codes literally.
seed.scam2.explanation: A contact appears in distress but their account may be compromised. Call your family first.
